methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs with a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, explicit ownership, and measurable key results.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe customer and business outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure meaningful movement on customer or business KPIs.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q3 Expand AI-assisted commerce and retail-aware automation
companyObjectives.statement: Deepen Amazon's advantage by making discovery, inventory, and media decisions more predictive and less manual.

objectives.title: 2026-Q3 commerce automation goal
objectives.objective: Increase the share of commerce decisions assisted by prediction and AI without reducing trust or control.

keyResults.target: Increase helpful AI-assisted shopping sessions by 15%
keyResults.statement: Increase useful adoption of AI-assisted discovery in mainstream shopping journeys.

executingTeams.intent: Improve assistant usefulness and shopping integration.
